revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lunisolar September]] to [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* {{ill|Kanpyō|ja|寛平|1=Kanpyō (era)|lt=Kanpyō|qq= (era)|1=Kanpyō (era)|lt=Kanpyō|qq= (era)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 6 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|894|ja|894th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1688|ja|1688th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Jōkyō (Japan)|ja|貞享|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1472|ja|1472nd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Wang Yangming|ja|王陽明|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} and founder of {{ill|Yangmingism|ja|陽明学|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
* {{ill|1917|ja|1917th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} – {{ill|Park Chung-hee|ja|朴正煕|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , {{ill|politician|ja|政治家|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , and President of South Korea (+ {{ill|1979|ja|1979th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 2 / {{ill|Shōhei (Japan)|ja|正平|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1351|ja|1351st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Musō Soseki|ja|夢窓疎石|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|ja|臨済宗|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Makino Sadachika|ja|牧野貞長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , {{ill|politician|ja|政治家|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1733|ja|1733rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|29|10|1|8|30|10|9|0930|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|9月30日 (旧暦)|version=86473320|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:September 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:September 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 30일]] [[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:九月三十]] [[en:draft:September 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ja:11月の歴史的Events]] [[ar:September 30 (Lunisolar)]]

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* {{ill|Kanpyō|ja|寛平|1=Kanpyō (era)|lt=Kanpyō|qq= (era)|1=Kanpyō (era)|lt=Kanpyō|qq= (era)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpyō|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpyō (era)|qq=}} 6 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|894|ja|894年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/894|qq=}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 1|qq=}} ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1688|ja|1688年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1688|qq=}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 23|qq=}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Jōkyō (Japan)|ja|貞享|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōkyō (Japan)|qq=}} to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|qq=}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1472|ja|1472nd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1472|qq=}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 31|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Wang Yangming|ja|王陽明|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wang Yangming|qq=}} , {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ming dynasty|qq=}} {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of {{ill|Yangmingism|ja|陽明学|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yangmingism|qq=}} .
* {{ill|1917|ja|1917年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1917|qq=}} – {{ill|Park Chung-hee|ja|朴正煕|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Chung-hee|qq=}} , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=}} , {{ill|politician|ja|政治家|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/politician|qq=}} , and President of South Korea (+ {{ill|1979|ja|1979年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1979|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|qq=}} 2 / {{ill|Shōhei (Japan)|ja|正平|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōhei (Japan)|qq=}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1351|ja|1351st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1351|qq=}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 20|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Musō Soseki|ja|夢窓疎石|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musō Soseki|qq=}} , a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|ja|臨済宗|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinzai school|qq=}} (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1275|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1796|qq=}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 30|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Makino Sadachika|ja|牧野貞長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makino Sadachika|qq=}} , {{ill|politician|ja|政治家|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/politician|qq=}} (* {{ill|1733|ja|1733年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1733|qq=}} ).

* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|qq=}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1472|ja|1472年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1472|qq=}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 31|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Wang Yangming|ja|王陽明|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wang Yangming|qq=}} , {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ming dynasty|qq=}} {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of {{ill|Yangmingism|ja|陽明学|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yangmingism|qq=}} .
* {{ill|1917|ja|1917年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1917|qq=}} – {{ill|Park Chung-hee|ja|朴正煕|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Chung-hee|qq=}} , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=}} , {{ill|politician|ja|政治家|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/politician|qq=}} , and President of South Korea (+ {{ill|1979|ja|1979年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1979|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|qq=}} 2 / {{ill|Shōhei (Japan)|ja|正平|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōhei (Japan)|qq=}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1351|ja|1351年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1351|qq=}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 20|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Musō Soseki|ja|夢窓疎石|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musō Soseki|qq=}} , a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|ja|臨済宗|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinzai school|qq=}} (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1275|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1796|qq=}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 30|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Makino Sadachika|ja|牧野貞長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makino Sadachika|qq=}} , {{ill|politician|ja|政治家|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/politician|qq=}} (* {{ill|1733|ja|1733年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1733|qq=}} ).

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|qq=}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|qq=}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|29|10|1|8|30|10|9|0930|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月三十]]
{{translated page|ja|9月30日 (旧暦)|version=86473320|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|qq=}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|qq=}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|29|10|1|8|30|10|9|0930|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|qq=}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|qq=}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).
== See Also ==

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|qq=}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|29|10|1|8|30|10|9|0930|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840189]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 30|qq=September 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|qq=}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). * [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|qq=|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840189]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 30|qq=September 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|qq=|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|qq=|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).

* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|qq=|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).

revision.comment: Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840189]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 30|qq=September 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|qq=|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840189]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 30|qq=September 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).
== See Also ==

* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.

* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840189]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 30|qq=September 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).

As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
