revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840189]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 30|qq=September 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|29|10|1|8|30|10|9|0930|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840189]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 30|qq=September 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840189]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 30|qq=September 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kanpyō (era)|Kanpyō]] 6 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:894|894]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō (Japan)]] to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian [[:en:1472|1472]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Wang Yangming|Wang Yangming]] , [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of [[:en:Yangmingism|Yangmingism]] .
* [[:en:1917|1917]] – [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung-hee]] , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , [[:en:Politician|politician]] , and President of South Korea (+ [[:en:1979|1979]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei (Japan)]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1351|1351]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]] , a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai school]] (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Makino Sadanaga|Makino Sadachika]] , [[:en:Politician|politician]] (* [[:en:1733|1733]] ).
== See Also ==

* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|en|1796|WD=Q7818|lt=1796}} {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30}} ) – {{ill|Makino Sadanaga|en|Makino Sadanaga|WD=Q6739705|lt=Makino Sadachika}} , {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|WD=Q82955|lt=politician}} (* {{ill|1733|en|1733|WD=Q6972|lt=1733}} ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840189]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 30|qq=September 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* {{ill|Kanpyō (era)|en|Kanpyō (era)|WD=Q1346292|lt=Kanpyō}} 6 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|894|en|894|WD=Q30577|lt=894}} {{ill|November 1|en|November 1|WD=Q2997|lt=November 1}} ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1688|en|1688|WD=Q7671|lt=1688}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|WD=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō (Japan)}} to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1472|en|1472|WD=Q6589|lt=1472}} {{ill|October 31|en|October 31|WD=Q2949|lt=October 31}} ) – {{ill|Wang Yangming|en|Wang Yangming|WD=Q378462|lt=Wang Yangming}} , {{ill|Ming dynasty|en|Ming dynasty|WD=Q9903|lt=Ming dynasty}} {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of {{ill|Yangmingism|en|Yangmingism|WD=Q697205|lt=Yangmingism}} .
* {{ill|1917|en|1917|WD=Q2092|lt=1917}} – {{ill|Park Chung Hee|en|Park Chung Hee|WD=Q14356|lt=Park Chung-hee}} , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|WD=Q82955|lt=politician}} , and President of South Korea (+ {{ill|1979|en|1979|WD=Q2484|lt=1979}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei (Japan)}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1351|en|1351|WD=Q6104|lt=1351}} {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|WD=Q2959|lt=October 20}} ) – {{ill|Musō Soseki|en|Musō Soseki|WD=Q384703|lt=Musō Soseki}} , a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|WD=Q639625|lt=Rinzai school}} (* {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275}} ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|en|1796|WD=Q7818|lt=1796}} {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30}} ) – {{ill|Makino Sadanaga|en|Makino Sadanaga|WD=Q6739705|lt=Makino Sadachika}} , {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|WD=Q82955|lt=politician}} (* {{ill|1733|en|1733|WD=Q6972|lt=1733}} ).

* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1472|en|1472|WD=Q6589|lt=1472}} {{ill|October 31|en|October 31|WD=Q2949|lt=October 31}} ) – {{ill|Wang Yangming|en|Wang Yangming|WD=Q378462|lt=Wang Yangming}} , {{ill|Ming dynasty|en|Ming dynasty|WD=Q9903|lt=Ming dynasty}} {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of {{ill|Yangmingism|en|Yangmingism|WD=Q697205|lt=Yangmingism}} .
* {{ill|1917|en|1917|WD=Q2092|lt=1917}} – {{ill|Park Chung Hee|en|Park Chung Hee|WD=Q14356|lt=Park Chung-hee}} , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|WD=Q82955|lt=politician}} , and President of South Korea (+ {{ill|1979|en|1979|WD=Q2484|lt=1979}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei (Japan)}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1351|en|1351|WD=Q6104|lt=1351}} {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|WD=Q2959|lt=October 20}} ) – {{ill|Musō Soseki|en|Musō Soseki|WD=Q384703|lt=Musō Soseki}} , a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|WD=Q639625|lt=Rinzai school}} (* {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275}} ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|en|1796|WD=Q7818|lt=1796}} {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30}} ) – {{ill|Makino Sadanaga|en|Makino Sadanaga|WD=Q6739705|lt=Makino Sadachika}} , {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|WD=Q82955|lt=politician}} (* {{ill|1733|en|1733|WD=Q6972|lt=1733}} ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月三十]][[zh:九月三十]]
{{Not to be confused with|September 30|qq=September 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* {{ill|Kanpyō (era)|en|Kanpyō (era)|WD=Q1346292|lt=Kanpyō|1=Kanpyō (era)}} 6 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|894|en|894|WD=Q30577|lt=894|1=894}} {{ill|November 1|en|November 1|WD=Q2997|lt=November 1|1=November 1}} ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1688|en|1688|WD=Q7671|lt=1688|1=1688}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23|1=October 23}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|WD=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō (Japan)|1=Jōkyō}} to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1472|en|1472|WD=Q6589|lt=1472|1=1472}} {{ill|October 31|en|October 31|WD=Q2949|lt=October 31|1=October 31}} ) – {{ill|Wang Yangming|en|Wang Yangming|WD=Q378462|lt=Wang Yangming|1=Wang Yangming}} , {{ill|Ming dynasty|en|Ming dynasty|WD=Q9903|lt=Ming dynasty|1=Ming dynasty}} {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of {{ill|Yangmingism|en|Yangmingism|WD=Q697205|lt=Yangmingism|1=Yangmingism}} .
* {{ill|1917|en|1917|WD=Q2092|lt=1917|1=1917}} – {{ill|Park Chung Hee|en|Park Chung Hee|WD=Q14356|lt=Park Chung-hee|1=Park Chung Hee}} , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|WD=Q82955|lt=politician|1=Politician}} , and President of South Korea (+ {{ill|1979|en|1979|WD=Q2484|lt=1979|1=1979}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei (Japan)|1=Zhengping}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1351|en|1351|WD=Q6104|lt=1351|1=1351}} {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|WD=Q2959|lt=October 20|1=October 20}} ) – {{ill|Musō Soseki|en|Musō Soseki|WD=Q384703|lt=Musō Soseki|1=Musō Soseki}} , a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|WD=Q639625|lt=Rinzai school|1=Rinzai school}} (* {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275|1=1275}} ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|en|1796|WD=Q7818|lt=1796|1=1796}} {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30|1=October 30}} ) – {{ill|Makino Sadanaga|en|Makino Sadanaga|WD=Q6739705|lt=Makino Sadachika|1=Makino Sadanaga}} , {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|WD=Q82955|lt=politician|1=Politician}} (* {{ill|1733|en|1733|WD=Q6972|lt=1733|1=1733}} ).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
* {{ill|Kanpyō (era)|en|Kanpyō (era)|WD=Q1346292|lt=Kanpyō|1=Kanpyō (era)}} 6 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|894|en|894|WD=Q30577|lt=894|1=894}} {{ill|November 1|en|November 1|WD=Q2997|lt=November 1|1=November 1}} ) – The abolition of the {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Japanese missions to Tang China) is decided based on the recommendation of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} .
* {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1688|en|1688|WD=Q7671|lt=1688|1=1688}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23|1=October 23}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|WD=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō (Japan)|1=Jōkyō}} to Genroku.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chenghua|ja|成化|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chenghua|1=Chenghua|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1061787}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1472|en|1472|WD=Q6589|lt=1472|1=1472}} {{ill|October 31|en|October 31|WD=Q2949|lt=October 31|1=October 31}} ) – {{ill|Wang Yangming|en|Wang Yangming|WD=Q378462|lt=Wang Yangming|1=Wang Yangming}} , {{ill|Ming dynasty|en|Ming dynasty|WD=Q9903|lt=Ming dynasty|1=Ming dynasty}} {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} and founder of {{ill|Yangmingism|en|Yangmingism|WD=Q697205|lt=Yangmingism|1=Yangmingism}} .
* {{ill|1917|en|1917|WD=Q2092|lt=1917|1=1917}} – {{ill|Park Chung Hee|en|Park Chung Hee|WD=Q14356|lt=Park Chung-hee|1=Park Chung Hee}} , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|WD=Q82955|lt=politician|1=Politician}} , and President of South Korea (+ {{ill|1979|en|1979|WD=Q2484|lt=1979|1=1979}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kan'ō (Japan)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei (Japan)|1=Zhengping}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1351|en|1351|WD=Q6104|lt=1351|1=1351}} {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|WD=Q2959|lt=October 20|1=October 20}} ) – {{ill|Musō Soseki|en|Musō Soseki|WD=Q384703|lt=Musō Soseki|1=Musō Soseki}} , a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|WD=Q639625|lt=Rinzai school|1=Rinzai school}} (* {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275|1=1275}} ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|en|1796|WD=Q7818|lt=1796|1=1796}} {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30|1=October 30}} ) – {{ill|Makino Sadanaga|en|Makino Sadanaga|WD=Q6739705|lt=Makino Sadachika|1=Makino Sadanaga}} , {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|WD=Q82955|lt=politician|1=Politician}} (* {{ill|1733|en|1733|WD=Q6972|lt=1733|1=1733}} ).
